1. Find the file: `/Users/jbiggs/code/buy-hh/buy-honehealth-com/themes/HoneLandingPages/src/page-womens-hormone-imbalance.php` (or in the build directory) and return the complete HTML/PHP markup for the `.monitor-for-early-indicators` section.

2. Find the SCSS file for womens-hormone-imbalance (look in `src/static/scss/pages/`) and return the complete styles for `.monitor-for-early-indicators` including all nested selectors.

3. Find the JS bundle file for womens-hormone-imbalance (look in `src/static/js/pages/`) and return any parallax-related JavaScript for this section.

Return all three pieces of code.
